examples: I always add some paprika for extra flavour.
Stir the chickpeas and sprinkle over the paprika.
I order black pepper sirloin without any paprika.
Garlic, paprika, cumin and lots of cilantro are always included in the earthy mix.
Marash, Aleppo and other Turkish peppers (also sold at specialty food stores) can be replaced with piment d'espelette or even paprika.
